subcodes.first_line: I do not know in what words I could describe my longing for my honoured sister. Whatever it may write, my pen falls short.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت همشیره را نمیدانم بچه زبان بیان اشتیاق نمایم آنچه بنویسم قلم قاصر است
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
